sqlCommands.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'pass1'
update TransX set BusCat = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '441%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'pass1'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,TransCode, Amt1,Flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,TransCode,ROUND(SUM(Amt1),2) as Amt1, 'pass2' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'pass1' group by KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,TransCode)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[version]' = 'P2' and Period < 4
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[version]' = 'P3' and Period < 7
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and '[version]' = 'P4' and Period < 10
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SUBSTRING(GL,6,2) in ('96','98')
insert into TransX (KeyID,Yr, Period,Co,GL,BusCat,PC,CC,Amt1, flex1) (Select '[batchID]-data2' as KeyID,Yr, Period,Co,GL,BusCat,PC,CC,Amt1, 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, '4060200317' as PC, '4HE'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'200317' as CC, ROUND(Amt1/3,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '1406000362')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, '1406000363' as PC, '1US'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'600363' as CC,ROUND(0-ROUND(Amt1/3,2)*2,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '1406000362')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, '1406000364' as PC, '1US'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'600364' as CC, ROUND(Amt1/3,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '3991061407')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, '4060200317' as PC, '4HE'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'200317' as CC, ROUND(Amt1/3,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '3991061407')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL
update TransX set CC = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL like '6%'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Amt1,Flex1) (Select KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC,ROUND(SUM(Amt1),2) as Amt1, 'pass2' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'pass1' group by KeyID,Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC)
update TransX set Ledger = 'UG', Flex1 = '[version]' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set CC = '1EAI000000', PC = '' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CostCenter = 1

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, '1406000364' as PC, '1US'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'600364' as CC, ROUND(Amt1/3,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '4060100317')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, '3991061409' as PC, '3NS'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'101409' as CC, ROUND(Amt1/3,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '4060100317')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, '4060300317' as PC, '4HE'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'300317' as CC,ROUND(0-ROUND(Amt1/3,2)*2,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '4060100317')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, '3991061409' as PC, '3NS'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'101409' as CC, ROUND(Amt1/3,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '10406000362')
update TransX set Amt1 = round(-Amt1,2), flex1 = 'pass1' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not PC in ('1406000362','3991061407','4060100317')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, '4060200317' as PC, '4HE'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'200317' as CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode, ROUND(Amt1/3,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '1406000362')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, '1406000363' as PC, '1US'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'600363' as CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode,ROUND(0-ROUND(Amt1/3,2)*2,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '1406000362')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, '1406000364' as PC, '1US'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'600364' as CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode, ROUND(Amt1/3,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '3991061407')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, '4060200317' as PC, '4HE'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'200317' as CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode, ROUND(Amt1/3,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '3991061407')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, '3991061408' as PC, '3NS'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'101408' as CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode,ROUND(0-ROUND(Amt1/3,2)*2,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '3991061407')
update TransX set Flex1 = '''000' where Flex1 = 'P' and KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and SUBSTRING(GL,6,2) in ('96','98')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode, Amt1, flex1) (Select '[batchID]-data2' as KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode, Amt1, 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
update TransX set Amt1 = round(-Amt1,2), flex1 = 'pass1' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not PC in ('1406000362','3991061407','4060100317')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, '1406000364' as PC, '1US'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'600364' as CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode, ROUND(Amt1/3,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '4060100317')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, '3991061409' as PC, '3NS'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'101409' as CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode, ROUND(Amt1/3,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '4060100317')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, '4060300317' as PC, '4HE'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'300317' as CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode,ROUND(0-ROUND(Amt1/3,2)*2,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '4060100317')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, BusCat, '3991061409' as PC, '3NS'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'101409' as CC, Contract, UWYr,AccYr,Reinloc,Riskterr,Broker,ProdCode,Transcode, ROUND(Amt1/3,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '10406000362')
update TransX set CC = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL like '6%'
update TransX set PC = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and CC <> ''
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set PK = (CASE WHEN Amt1 < 0 THEN '50' ELSE '40' END) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update x set x.PCDesc = y.Name from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'GCF Split for [Yr]/[Mo]' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, PC, CC, Amt1,flex1) (Select KeyID, Yr, Period, Co, GL, BusCat, '3991061408' as PC, '3NS'+SUBSTRING(CC,4,1)+'101408' as CC,ROUND(0-ROUND(Amt1/3,2)*2,2), 'pass1' as flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PC = '3991061407')
